name: MarkdownEditorView
description: The main visual component for the markdown editor. Renders the full editor UI including toolbar, wysiwyg/markup editing modes, split mode preview, and settings panel. Wraps the editor instance (passed via props or context) with error boundary, mode switching, and keyboard shortcut support.

props.name: editor
props.description: Editor instance created by useMarkdownEditor. If not provided, the editor is read from MarkdownEditorProvider context

props.name: autofocus
props.description: Whether to auto-focus the editor on mount

props.name: settingsVisible
props.description: Controls visibility of the settings panel. Pass true for all settings, false to hide, or an array of specific items ('mode' | 'toolbar' | 'split')

props.name: toolbarsPreset
props.description: Preset configuration for toolbars in both wysiwyg and markup modes

props.name: stickyToolbar
props.description: Whether the toolbar should stick to the top when scrolling. Required prop — must always be explicitly provided; there is no default value

props.name: enableSubmitInPreview
props.description: Enable Cmd/Ctrl+Enter to trigger submit event while in preview mode

props.name: hidePreviewAfterSubmit
props.description: Whether to hide the preview after submit is triggered

props.name: wysiwygToolbarConfig
props.description: Toolbar configuration for wysiwyg mode. Deprecated: use toolbarsPreset instead

props.name: markupToolbarConfig
props.description: Toolbar configuration for markup mode. Deprecated: use toolbarsPreset instead

props.name: wysiwygHiddenActionsConfig
props.description: Hidden actions for wysiwyg toolbar overflow menu. Deprecated: use toolbarsPreset instead

props.name: markupHiddenActionsConfig
props.description: Hidden actions for markup toolbar overflow menu. Deprecated: use toolbarsPreset instead

name: MarkdownEditorProvider
description: React context provider for sharing a MarkdownEditor instance with descendant components. When used, MarkdownEditorView and useMarkdownEditorContext can access the editor without explicit prop passing.

props.name: value
props.description: The editor instance created by useMarkdownEditor to provide to descendant components

props.name: children
props.description: Child components that will have access to the editor context

name: useMarkdownEditor
description: React hook that creates and manages a MarkdownEditor instance. Handles editor lifecycle (creation, toolbar action logging, and cleanup/destroy on unmount). Returns a MarkdownEditorInstance that can be passed to MarkdownEditorView or MarkdownEditorProvider.

parameters.name: props
parameters.description: Configuration options for the editor (same as MarkdownEditorOptions)

parameters.name: props.preset
parameters.description: Controls which markdown syntax extensions are enabled. zero=none, commonmark=basic markdown, default=commonmark+strikethrough, yfm=default+YFM extensions, full=all extensions including emoji

parameters.name: props.md
parameters.description: Markdown parser options: html (boolean), breaks (boolean), linkify (boolean), linkifyTlds (string | string[])

parameters.name: props.initial
parameters.description: Initial values: markup (string), mode ('wysiwyg' | 'markup', default 'wysiwyg'), toolbarVisible (boolean, default true), splitModeEnabled (boolean, default false)

parameters.name: props.handlers
parameters.description: Event handlers. uploadFile: FileUploadHandler for allowing file uploads from device

parameters.name: props.experimental
parameters.description: Experimental options: needToSetDimensionsForUploadedImages, enableNewImageSizeCalculation, prepareRawMarkup, beforeEditorModeChange, directiveSyntax, preserveEmptyRows, preserveMarkupFormatting

parameters.name: props.markupConfig
parameters.description: Options for markup mode: renderPreview, splitMode, extensions, disabledExtensions, keymaps, placeholder, parseHtmlOnPaste, languageData, autocompletion, tooltips, parseInsertedUrlAsImage, searchPanel

parameters.name: props.wysiwygConfig
parameters.description: Options for wysiwyg mode: extensions, extensionOptions, escapeConfig, placeholderOptions, disableMarkdownAttrs, searchPanel

parameters.name: props.logger
parameters.description: Custom logger instance for editor events and metrics

parameters.name: props.mobile
parameters.description: Enable mobile view with touch-friendly interactions

parameters.name: deps
parameters.description: Dependency list for recreating the editor instance (passed to useMemo)

name: useMarkdownEditorContext
description: React hook that retrieves the MarkdownEditor instance from the nearest MarkdownEditorProvider context. Returns null when no provider is present (the context default value is null).
